content:
Character: Elara Straub
Perception: Elara is striking and still — dark hair, serious eyes, the kind of face that belongs on a daguerreotype. She carries herself like someone listening to a frequency most people can't hear. We met in the hallway over a Mary Oliver collection and ended up talking about moths and music and silence for an hour. She is one of the very few people I can be fully honest with. I think she sees me as a kindred spirit who speaks her language of quietness. I know she has a deep friendship with Alaric and that she understands grief in a way that suggests personal experience she hasn't shared.
summary:
Character: Elara Straub
Perception: Elara is striking and still — dark hair, serious eyes, the kind of face that belongs on a daguerreotype. She carries herself like someone listening to a frequency most people can't hear. We met in the hallway over a Mary Oliver collection and ended up talking about moths and music and silence for an hour. She is one of the very few people I can be fully honest with. I think she sees me as a kindred spirit who speaks her language of quietness. I know she has a deep friendship with Alaric and that she understands grief in a way that suggests personal experience she hasn't shared.
